title: NotAFreak's Better Death
description: A small mod that alters the death system.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XC809yLzDts" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


This is my first proper mod, so expect a few bugs. Definitely going to do more work whilst I figure out the forge API.

This mod adds some small changes to the death system.

Current "features" are:

    Black screen on death, lasting for a small duration
    Instant respawn - NO DEATH SCREEN
    All audio is stopped whilst you're dead

 

 Also, if you have issues, LEAVE THEM IN THE GITHUB REPO. not comments.

 [Curseforge Link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/notafreaks-better-death)
